_note: Empty by design. None of the bundled demo CVEs are in the real CISA KEV catalog, and habiregottenzartto will not falsely stamp a CVE as actively-exploited. Run `habir db sync` to ingest the live CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog. The KEV risk-floor logic is exercised by tests/test_risk.py with clearly-synthetic fixtures.
title: CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities Catalog (seed placeholder)
